source_request: Improve the landing page hero section so the product feels clearer and more credible without redesigning the whole site.
objective: Improve clarity and credibility of the landing page hero section without changing overall product positioning.
deliverable: A bounded hero-section improvement proposal suitable for specialist delegation and later execution review.
constraints: Limit scope to the landing page hero section.
Do not redesign the full site.
Do not invent new product features.
Do not change pricing, branding, or core product positioning.
acceptance_criteria: Hero section value proposition is clearer.
At least two credibility/trust improvements are identified.
Changes remain limited to the approved scope.
No new product claims are introduced.
escalation_triggers: Hero section files cannot be identified confidently.
Required change expands beyond approved scope.
